caption: A screen recording displays the website RANDOM.ORG, specifically its "True Random Number Service." In the beginning, a "Dice Roller" page is open where the user selects "2" virtual dice and clicks "Roll Dice." The screen then transitions to show the result of the roll, two six-sided dice showing three and five, with a timestamp of "2021-05-14 07:13:39 UTC." The user then navigates to a "List Randomizer" page, where a list of names including "Robert Flowers," "Paul Joe McHally," and "Chris Maxwell" is entered into a text field under "Part 1: Enter List Items." Throughout the sequence, a video overlay in the bottom right corner shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap, accompanied by a red banner that reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" alongside a YouTube "Subscribe" button. The bottom of the screen features a website URL: "WWW.JASPYSCASERBREAKS.COM".
